programs.title: Married...With Children
programs.desc: When Al's car bites the dust, he digs up his nest egg and heads for the auto showroom to wheel and deal for the car of his dreams.

programs.title: Married...With Children
programs.desc: After couch potato in-training Steve is fired, he plays hooky from his job hunt to go to the zoo, determined to save a sea turtle named Bosco.

programs.title: Married...With Children
programs.desc: A rainstorm brings out the handyman in Al, who doggedly attempts to fix a leaky roof.

programs.title: Married...With Children
programs.desc: Despite his rare good intentions, Al fails to make it to the bank in time to withdraw his Christmas Club money, and the Bundy family is destined to go presentless, again, unless Al can find a way to make some quick cash. (Part I of II)

programs.title: Married...With Children
programs.desc: When Al blows his only chance to give the family a merry Christmas, he miserably wishes that he didn't exist until a not-so-angelic angel shows what life without Al - but with Peggy's loving husband Norman - would be like. (Part II)

programs.title: Married...With Children
programs.desc: Sick and tired of being the sole breadwinner, Al challenges the family to find jobs, but is in for a surprise when Kelly's talents land her the lead as "The Girl" in the Guttercats' music video.
